Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
John Chu, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Donald Tope.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: Metro-Trak, LLC., a Minnesota limited liablility company and Davis R. Schwartz as follows:
Principal in total $60,234.87
Interest in toal $4,514.89
Late Charges in total $1,784.83
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $475.00, for a total of $69,834.59, see scanned doc. for break down of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Continued To Jun-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
